_comment: Epistasis rules applied by the PhenotypeEngine after traits are computed (spec sections 13.3, 21). A rule whose 'condition' holds applies its 'effect': mask_traits hides traits (they exist but cannot be observed) or 'override' forces a trait value. ABSTRACT simulator rules.

rules.explanation: Eye pigment is not visible because eye development failed — there is essentially no eye to show a color. The eye-color genotype is hidden by the eyeless phenotype.
Wing shape and vein quality are moot because the wing is essentially absent; severe wing-size loss overrides the wing-shape genes.
